message:
fix(goose): guard NaN/Infinity timestamps, preserve fractional precision, log message errors

Three correctness fixes from code review:
- Guard against NaN/Infinity in Real timestamp values (would produce
  epoch-zero or i64::MAX timestamps causing incorrect filtering)
- Preserve sub-second precision for fractional JSONL timestamps
  (was truncating 1700000000.5 to 1700000000 before millis conversion)
- Log message-level SQLite errors instead of silently swallowing
  them via .flatten() (matches session-level error handling pattern)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
